one_line_summary: Exceptional documentation set with verified runnable tutorial and comprehensive API coverage; signature/import check failures drag faithfulness modestly.
strengths: Tutorial code blocks were actually executed and verified against the pinned checkout, including a mid-task correction of the --print vs -p flag
Architecture doc is thorough: component diagram, data flow per turn, four extension points, four-layer security model, concurrency, observability, honest tradeoffs/non-goals
API reference has excellent coverage (100% coverage rate) and 96.7% symbol existence, organized cleanly by module with a working TOC
weaknesses: Signature match rate only 42.6% — signatures are sometimes lightly paraphrased or include attributes/methods not exactly matching source
Import check 1/4 — some documented import paths fail to resolve cleanly
A few symbols mentioned (e.g. NativeExecutor.tool_names, some helper constants) may not exist exactly as described
